subcodes.first_line: O dwellers of the blessed village in the vale of Hijaz, of Yathrib and the desert plain of Batha, wherefrom roamed the tribes of Qahtan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل قریه مبارکه وادی حجاز و یثرب و صحرای بطحاء که جولانگاه قبائل قحطان
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @law of transformation and change, @universality of the Cause
